name: Trust402
tagline: Trust before you pay. Proof after you buy.
positioning: Buyer-side trust and procurement agent for x402 resources.

freeResources.purpose: OpenAPI contract for agents and marketplaces.
Launch readiness, safety, and backlog status.

paidLaunchResources.purpose: Run a fast live probe for one x402 endpoint and summarize challenge/payment-flow readiness.
Score one x402 resource for trust, schema, price, discovery, and receipt readiness.
Evaluate a full origin/domain and its x402 discovery posture.
Check whether a seller endpoint is ready for marketplace discovery and autonomous buyers.
Rank 2-10 candidate paid resources for a goal, budget, and risk policy.
Create a bounded spend plan without spending money.
Produce a full diligence report for an x402 endpoint or origin with hash-ready evidence.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Useful only after compare-resources and procurement-plan are trusted.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Produce a concrete quote for a multi-resource purchase path.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Live spending requires hot-wallet policy, allowlists, receipts, and approval thresholds.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Execute approved paid subcalls inside strict spend policy.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Proof402 should be integrated externally after core trust tools prove useful.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Create or delegate a proof receipt for a purchased result hash.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: The launch check-x402 tool should prove whether repeated checks are wanted.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Run a one-shot x402 payment-flow and drift check.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Badges need historical checks and credibility.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Generate or refresh a public trust badge snapshot.

laterResourcesToPreserve.reasonToWait: Hashing is too simple to be a strong paid resource by itself.
laterResourcesToPreserve.purpose: Prepare a result hash for receipt workflows.
